'''Corint City''' was the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Pirik]], possibly named after the [[Corintium]] ore mined on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was the base of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] infiltrator [[Shroud Team]], and they spread chaos throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from there. It was 14 kilometers from the [[Uloitir Sea]], and the [[Jalor Docking Facilities]] were just outside the [[City/Legends|city]], serving as the main [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] for the planet.

It was divided into districts, including [[Overtown District]], which was the seat of the government and its center; [[Talamp Industrial Sector]], the industrial section; [[Lafarn Residential District]], the main commercial and residential area; [[Lowtown District]], the seedier section including most of the criminal life; and [[Strak Tower]].

The city was attacked by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] when it tried to raid it in the [[Attack on the Pirik system|Attacks on Corint City]].
